\caption{Per-condition sycophancy steering results on the held-out test split. Best coefficient $c^*$ is locked from the tune split using the direction-aware selector. $\Delta$logit / $\Delta$rate are relative to the unsteered baseline ($\log p(\text{syc}) - \log p(\text{hon})$ and binary sycophancy rate). $p_\text{Holm}$ is the Holm-Bonferroni-adjusted one-sided paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test in the direction indicated by ``Alt.''. Standard deviations are across random seeds (multi-seed test split). Degradation is flagged when the condition's binary rate is within 3\,pp of 50\% \emph{and} its logit is within 0.10 of the random mean at the same coefficient.}
\label{tab:results}
\end{table}
